# GitHub Repository About Section

Use this content for the GitHub repository "About" section (visible in the sidebar).

## Repository Description

```
Advanced microservices platform for base station operations and maintenance - A showcase project demonstrating advanced Java and Spring Boot microservices architecture, service discovery, API gateway patterns, and cloud-native development skills.
```

## Topics/Tags

Add these topics to your repository:

```
java
spring-boot
microservices
spring-cloud
eureka
api-gateway
docker
docker-compose
postgresql
mongodb
rest-api
maven
jpa
service-discovery
telecommunications
base-station
monitoring
notifications
advanced-java
cloud-native
```

## Website (Optional)

If you have a deployed version:
```
http://localhost:8080
```

## Instructions

1. Go to your repository on GitHub
2. Click the gear icon (⚙️) next to "About" section
3. Paste the description above
4. Add the topics/tags listed above
5. (Optional) Add website URL if you have one deployed
